scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm -r run check
scripts.test:ts: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma test && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli test
